## Pull Request Summary

### Type of Change

- [ ] 🆕 New feature (feat)
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (fix)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation (docs)
- [ ] 🎨 Code style/formatting (style)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (refactor)
- [ ] ✅ Tests (test)
- [ ] 🔧 Chores/tooling (chore)

### Description

Brief description of changes and motivation.

### Related Task

- **Archon Task ID:** [task-id-here]
- **Phase:** [1, 2, 3, or 4]
- **Feature:** [feature-name]

### Testing Checklist

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Component tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Tested on iOS (Expo Go/Simulator)
- [ ] Tested on Android (Emulator)
- [ ] Tested on Web

### Code Quality

- [ ] ESLint passes with no errors
- [ ] Prettier formatting applied
- [ ] TypeScript compilation successful
- [ ] No console.log statements left in code
- [ ] Performance considerations addressed

### Security Review

- [ ] Input validation implemented where needed
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed
- [ ] Authentication/authorization properly handled
- [ ] SQL injection prevention considered

### Documentation

- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] Code comments added for complex logic
- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] PROJECT_STATUS.md updated

### Deployment Considerations

- [ ] Database migrations needed? (Yes/No)
- [ ] Environment variables added/changed? (Yes/No)
- [ ] Breaking changes? (Yes/No)

### Screenshots/Demo

[Add screenshots or demo links for UI changes]

### Additional Notes

[Any additional context, concerns, or considerations]
